title: Standardize Headless-Safe Scheduled Task Actions
summary: Inventory and harden scheduled task launch actions using a wscript/VBS hidden-launch pattern where console popups can occur, then codify defaults in scheduler skill docs.
keyOutcomes: 4 tasks migrated to wscript/VBS headless pattern (conductor-weekly-report, offer-validation-round1-daily-rollup, skill-health-validator, skill-sync-monitor)
User-validated: no visible popup on force-run
Created scheduler-headless-runbook.md with migration procedure and error recovery
Updated windows-task-scheduler SKILL.md v2.1.0 with headless-by-default policy
risks: Task argument reformatting errors can break schedules
Older task compatibility modes may require XML-level updates
validationCriteria: All applicable tasks use wscript/VBS hidden launcher - PASSED
Representative runs complete without visible popup - PASSED (user confirmed)
